author: SypherPK
text:
Fortnite SEASON 3 is HERE!
Chapter 7 Season 3 is HERE and Epic has given us an entire new map! This is one of the biggest season overhauls Fortnite has ever pulled off. Enjoy guys!

author: SypherPK
text:
Fortnite SHATTERED Event Reaction!
Fortnite COOKED on the Shattered Live Event! We got a massive showdown between the Foundation and Ice King, and the Visitor has finally been unmasked after 8 years. Absolute Cinema. See you guys in Season 3!
